name: 高令宁在高府的房间
description: 温暖舒适的居室,床榻加厚垫褥,床边设脉枕与药箱。窗边摆摇篮,篮中放虎头帽与小衣物。桌上摆针线筐,半成品婴儿衣物。房内设香炉,燃安胎香。墙上挂送子观音图,角落堆放补品。光线柔和,窗帘半掩。
visual_reference: Ming Dynasty pregnant woman's room, warm comfortable interior, thick padded bed, pulse pillow and medicine box, cradle by window with tiger-head cap and baby clothes, sewing basket with unfinished infant garments, incense burner with calming fragrance, Guanyin painting on wall, nutritional supplements in corner, soft lighting, half-drawn curtains, nurturing atmosphere
lighting: 柔和日光透过窗帘,室内光线温暖安宁
